chip.name: TC
chip.reason: Triple Captain is the only chip left. With Haaland OUT, the best captain is single-fixture Salah on a soft home game — a one-match TC is a coin-flip, not a high-floor play, and there is no GW38 DGW to maximise it. Defensible to fire on Salah ONLY if chasing a specific rank target; otherwise hold.

risks: Captain switched OFF Bowen (WHU away at Spurs, FDR 3.3) ONTO M.Salah (LIV home vs CRY, FDR 2.0). sim-lab gives Salah EV 6.7 vs Bowen 5.32 with a far better fixture and higher ceiling — this is Claude's key disagreement with the current armband. Bowen kept as VC.
Gemini captained Haaland who is CONFIRMED OUT (medical 0%) — that pick is a data error and must NOT be followed.
Gabriel DOUBTFUL (50/50 knee) — benched to avoid a likely zero. If confirmed fit, he is a strong ARS-home-vs-EVE pick; swap back in for Munoz.
Gvardiol HIGH rotation risk (Man City dead-rubber rest) — confirm team news Saturday; if out, promote Gabriel or Kluivert.
Mateta away at Anfield (FDR 4.3) is the weakest attacker in the XI, but no better-fixtured FWD bench alternative exists (Haaland out).
